name: cognitive-thermals-research
description: A research-rigour scaffold that protects the researcher's synthesis, judgement and academic integrity.

interface.shortDescription: Protect research judgement and academic rigour
interface.longDescription: A five-stage critical-inquiry scaffold for postgraduate and professional research. It protects the researcher's own synthesis while enforcing evidence appraisal, claim-evidence calibration, search discipline and citation integrity.
defaultPrompt: Help me refine this research question without answering it for me.
Pressure-test whether my claims are supported by the evidence.
Build a structured search brief, including disconfirming evidence.
